name: claude-multiacct
tagline: Several Claude accounts in one Claude Desktop, switchable per session.
sellMe: Run more than one Claude subscription without separate apps or signing in and out. claude-multiacct adds an account picker inside Claude Desktop, so you can add accounts, remove them, and choose which one a session uses. It sets itself up when Claude starts and keeps working after Claude updates.

products.name: cli-shim
products.description: Runs each session under the account you picked for it.

products.name: watcher
products.description: Keeps everything installed and re-applies it after Claude updates.

products.name: http-bridge
products.description: A small local service that holds your accounts and answers the picker.

products.name: extension
products.description: The account picker that appears inside Claude Desktop.
